bits.premise: White friends are a seasonal luxury resource.
Sandbar parties turn beach games into racial land conquest.

lines.text: Hell yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Oh, man, it's summertime.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I love summertime because my white friends show back up.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: They go into hiding when it's wintertime.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And I just-- I miss flexing how good my white friends is,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: like, on the internet.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, all of my black friends and family,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: they hit me up after I post a story of me on another jet ski
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that I didn't just pay for.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they're like, hey, share your white friends with us.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I'm like, no, nigga, y'all don't know how to act.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Y'all don't know how to act at all.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Like, I got better white friends than white people.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Like, what did you do last weekend?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was at WrestleMania.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was at WrestleMania because my white friends took me.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It was a great time.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: So I finally decided to take my brother out to a sandbar party.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Sandbars is this thing that happened in the ocean.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and like a piece of land come up,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then you take a boat over there
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and then you get to claim the land, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So I'm really giving my brother his 40 acres in a mule,
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: right, I'm really just putting on for him.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And after about 40 minutes of arguing with that nigga,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: he finally took his Air Force Ones off at the beach,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: right, 'cause he looked me dead in my eyes
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and he was like, "Ain't nobody gonna see my toes," right?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And I respect boundaries.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And so we, this nigga, he got his socks in the sand.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And when you had a sandbar, it's important
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that when like another group of white people come,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you gotta fight these niggas to the death.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You gotta play like beer pong and flip cup.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And then the loser, they gotta go.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they was real happy to have two black friends there.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nigga, we held the island the whole day.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: After, 'cause like the week before,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: they was like, "Yo, Dejic, when you coming out,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We just lost six islands.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know what I'm saying?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: They brought they black friend.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You was supposed to be here, you know, suit up.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: That's my time out there.
